conditional: any other use Council determines compatible/consistent with general plan

zones.notes: Reachable via Municode API (job 483874, Supp. 78, Ord. 5142). Height 25 ft at setback, up to 35 ft via 45-degree slope. Front yard schedule by abutting ROW width: 20 ft (50-59 ft ROW) / 25 / 30 / 50 (>99); recorded 20 = minimum. Side 30 interior; rear 40. Density 1 du/net acre (code defines net acre as 43,000 sf; min_lot_size carried as 43,560). Min lot width and FAR not specified.

conditional: any other use Council determines compatible

Height/front 'Same as AG-1' (25/35 ft; front 20 min). Side 5 ft min; on lots without alley access one side must be 10, total both 15. Rear 15 ft.

Side 5 min; without alley access one side 10, total both 15. Rear 10 ft. Lots formerly SF-7 remain conforming re lot size.

zones.notes: Reachable via Municode API. Two product types: SUBDIVISION (max 8 du/net acre, avg net lot 5,445 sf) and PARK (max 12 du/net acre, avg space 3,630 sf). Recorded max_density 12 = park; min_lot_size 5,445 = subdivision avg net lot. Coverage 40%. Height: mobile homes 15 ft (other principal buildings 'Same as MF-1' 25/35). Front/side 'Same as MF-1'. Rear 10 ft (30 other). Subdivisions/parks min 10 gross acres. Min lot width not specified.

zones.notes: Reachable via Municode API. Height 30 ft (30 max if adjacent single-family residential), up to 45 via slope. Front: none required generally (recorded 0). Side/rear: 0 base, but 50 abutting single-family / 25 abutting multi-family residential. Coverage 55%; open space min 15% (20% if building >30 ft). Min lot/width/FAR not specified.

convenience retail/service for airport employees/patrons within principal buildings

zones.notes: Reachable via Municode API (amended Ord. 5142). Height max 2 stories or 35 ft (whichever less); buildings >=100 ft from any site boundary may reach 50 ft. Street yard 20 ft (10 from ramp access drive); interior yards 10 ft. Applies only to City-owned/leased airport land (Chandler Municipal Airport). FAA Part 77 / Airport Layout Plan also govern. Coverage/min lot/width/FAR not specified; density N/A.

zones.notes: Reachable via Municode API. Building setbacks 0 ft front/side/rear permitted (traditional street wall). Height 30 ft at setback, up to 45 via slope; taller requires PAD. Lot coverage up to 100%. Early Twentieth Century Commercial architecture + Historic Preservation Commission design review required. Applies only to specified downtown lots (San Marcos Pl, Arizona Pl, Buffalo St, Boston St, Arizona Ave). CORRECTION: prior note cited Sec. 35-3200; correct section is 35-3204. Min lot/width/FAR/density not specified.
